title: Central Kitchen Assistant (Gelato Maker)
description:
Central Kitchen Assistant (Gelato Maker)

Role Overview

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Central Kitchen Assistant (Gelato Maker) to support our gelato production and central kitchen operations. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys hands-on food production, working with recipes, and being part of a supportive team environment.

Key Responsibilities

Gelato Production

  • Prepare and produce gelato using fresh, high-quality ingredients.
  • Follow standard recipes and production processes to ensure consistency in flavour, texture, and quality.
  • Assist in recipe mixing and gelato production under supervision.
  • Operate and handle gelato production machines and equipment safely.

Inventory & Stock Management

  • Handle ingredients, monitor stock levels, and support inventory management.
  • Receive, check, and process incoming stock deliveries.
  • Assist with order fulfilment, packing, and dispatch of goods.
  • Support warehouse organisation and maintenance.

Central Kitchen & Operational Support

  • Maintain cleanliness, hygiene, and food safety standards in the production area.
  • Ensure proper storage and organisation of ingredients and supplies.
  • Support central kitchen duties as required.
  • Provide operational support to outlets when needed.

Requirements

  • Ability to follow detailed recipes and work with precision.
  • Positive attitude, reliability, and willingness to learn.
  • Good time management skills and ability to handle multiple tasks.
  • Physically fit, able to stand for long hours and lift or move heavy items.
  • Basic numeracy skills (counting, measuring, and calculating quantities.
  • Ability to organise stock and maintain a clean, safe workspace.
  • Team player with good communication skills.

postedCompany.description:
rumeL’s Sourdough Neapolitan pizza dough was created in collaboration with Chef Silvio Groppelli, hailing from Sicily, Italy. Owner and head chef Silvio Groppelli was recognised by influential Italian food publication, Gambero Rosso, in 2021 and is ranked #1 pizza chef in Australia, and #44 pizza chef in the world.​

​rumeL’s Sourdough Neapolitan pizza combines the classic flavours of traditional Neapolitan pizza with the unique benefits of a naturally fermented sourdough crust. At rumeL, our sourdough is fermented for 48 hours, ensuring enhanced flavour, texture, and nutritional benefits with each bite. It is not just a healthier choice but also a more flavourful one. As more people embrace healthier eating habits, rumeL is excited to introduce Singapore’s Cheapest Sourdough Neapolitan Pizza!
postedCompany.name: RUMEL (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
